name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 50 shipped shared GM decision authority, atomic weekly transactions, visible client diagnostics, browser module reachability, revision-stamped responsive evidence, and a production all-mount MIME contract.
nextMilestone: Verify the pushed workflow and exact live /games/franchise-architect asset MIME types; if host routing still falls back to HTML, deliver the emitted mount contract to the sibling-owned router through Ark.
blockers: Launch/SPARKED remains evidence-gated until the canonical live origin has complete edge-security headers, football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying has a real received-message receipt, deploy provenance matches the expected workflow artifact, and the authoritative registry is reconciled.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Session 50 final direct evidence: full canonical Node suite 390/390, Playwright 18/18, Pages build/all-mount MIME smoke, and 20 responsive captures across 390/768/1440 in both themes.
testSuiteStatus.uiSuiteNote: Playwright passed 18/18; responsive evidence passed 20/20 captures with zero overflow/runtime errors and compliant critical targets.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

passed: full canonical Node suite 390/390 with exit 0
npm run smoke:pages with all-mount MIME contract
lastVerification.diagnosticNote: Earlier Commissioner stale-state and unsharded-test failures were root-fixed and superseded by direct green reruns.

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
